steps.title: Attach the modifier
steps.content: The opening phrase, Working with equipment designed for a billionth-of-a-meter scale, must describe the subject that comes after the comma. The logical subject is the people using the equipment: the nanoengineers.

steps.title: Avoid dangling subjects
steps.content: Choice A, Choice C, and Choice D make selenium nanoparticles the grammatical subject, but nanoparticles cannot work with equipment. A clause beginning with nanoengineers attaches the modifier to the people doing the work. The answer is B.
